channel.title: 📰 General News Daily
channel.description: Daily news briefing — markets, real estate, construction, finance, tech, health, and general interest

item.title: 📰 General News — Thursday, April 24, 2026
item.description:
⚠️ Gmail Connector Not Authenticated
The Gmail MCP connector requires re-authentication. No emails could be accessed for today's General News digest. The task confirmed the connector is disconnected and no inbox content was available to process.
🛠️ Action needed: Reconnect the Gmail connector in Cowork settings so the next scheduled run can access the AIdigestnews@gmail.com inbox.
Sources: Gmail inbox newsletters and subscriptions
Generated April 24, 2026 by Claude Cowork · General News RSS Feed
Status: Gmail connector authentication required — no content processed
